_meta.criterion: autonomy self-critique baked-in (single forward 에서 critique)
_meta.next: wire critique_step_with_supervision into train_clm.hexa @ §H once D-track CLM run starts

design_summary.approach: linear sigmoid head on CLM final hidden last-token row, teacher-forced from autonomy_loop external critic
design_summary.single_pass_property: score = sigmoid(W·h_last + b) computed alongside LM head — no second model call, no Claude shell-out, no autonomy_loop expand→execute→critique cascade required at inference
design_summary.supervision: external critic (anima-agent/llm_claude_adapter.claude_critique → CritiqueOut.score) is the regression target, MSE loss, sub-sampled at every Nth step (default 16) so claude shell-out cost is amortized
design_summary.decoupling: all glue lives in training/clm_critique_loss_wire.hexa — autonomy_loop.hexa is NOT modified per task guardrail (another session may be editing it)

head_architecture.input: h_last ∈ R^{d_hidden} (CLM final RMS-norm output, last token row)
head_architecture.init_strategy: det_rand LCG seeded; neutral helper (all-zero W, b=0) for max-uncertainty baseline

loss_combination.rationale: 0.1 keeps the auxiliary term ~0.5% of L_main at typical CE ≈ 2.0, large enough for gradient signal, small enough to not perturb the primary loss landscape

supervision_schedule.rationale: Claude shell-out is ~1-3 s; at every-16-steps a 50k-step CLM run gets ~3000 supervised samples, sufficient for a single-scalar regression head to converge

inference_gate.rationale: slightly above σ(0)=0.5 so an untrained or warmup-stage head's neutral output does NOT trigger regeneration; the inflection is calibrated for a moderately-trained head
inference_gate.rationale_fail_open: self-critique is a soft-quality signal; serving must never be blocked by a missing or misconfigured head — degrade silently and surface the reason in the GateDecision.reason field for prod logs
inference_gate.per_request_threshold_helper: critique_gate_run_with_threshold(...) — agent endpoints can use 0.7 for tighter quality, chat stays at 0.55

timing.T5_latency: PASS (d_hidden=256 amortized 100 calls = 0-10 ms per call, stage1 budget < 100 ms)

timing.T3_fail_open: PASS (unloaded + d_model mismatch both fail-open with explicit reason)
timing.T5_latency: PASS (d=256 seq=4 amortized 100 calls = 10-20 ms, stage1 budget < 100 ms)

loss_wire_self_test.result: ready (printed module-level smoke; teacher_used true on step 0, false on step 1; cadence override verified)

production_ceilings.latency_stage1_observed_ms: 10-20 (d=256 amortized) — interpreter-bound, NOT representative of GPU codegen
production_ceilings.latency_production_estimate_ms: < 1 microsecond at d=2560 once C-track GPU codegen lands (single dot product is sub-cache-line on H100)

supervision_cost_per_run.note: amortized — single sub-sampled call per 16 train steps

guardrails_honored: hexa-only — no .py, no shell scripts, no Rust
L0 freeze — only new files added, no edits to anima/core/{hub,laws,runtime/anima_runtime}.hexa
anima-agent/autonomy_loop.hexa NOT modified — wrapped via training/clm_critique_loss_wire.hexa instead
anima-agent/llm_claude_adapter.hexa NOT modified — referenced as supervision source only
no version numbers in filenames — date suffix on JSON state only (per existing shared/state convention)
feedback_troubleshoot_comments — every fix-spot has inline rationale comments

next_actions.task: import clm_critique_loss_wire in train_clm.hexa @ §H train_step, wire critique_step_with_supervision after the existing C41 aux-loss block; gate the teacher call behind should_call_teacher(state.step); add l_critique to TrainStepResult
log distribution of student_score on a held-out batch every 100 steps; set CRITIQUE_GATE_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT to the empirical p25 of accepted-by-human samples
import critique_gate in serving/clm_lore_serve.hexa serve(); call critique_gate_run after decoder_forward; on regenerate=true bump temperature 0.05 and re-run once (max retries = 1)
re-run T5 latency check at d_hidden=2560 on the GPU codegen build; assert < 5 ms per call wall-time; update production_ceilings.latency_stage1_observed_ms with the GPU number

update_log.note: D8 baked-in self-critique head + smoke + gate + loss-wire shipped; 5/5 + 16/16 + 5/5 PASS on stage1 hexa; train_clm.hexa wire pending
